utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Each includes the required core details: type of coverage and explicit costs. Health: explicitly states physical and mental health insurance with a monthly cost. Property: home/contents insurance with a monthly cost. Travel: travel insurance with a monthly cost. Additional services: enhancement services status and cost are specified (N/A with €0/month). Total budget: includes total monthly and annual costs. Therefore, all items are present and specified with costs as required.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three specific plans by name: EliteCare Premium Plan under health_coverage, EliteHome Premium Coverage under property_coverage, and PrimeTravel Premium Plan under travel_coverage. These exact names appear in the ground-truth ratings. We map each selected plan to its corresponding rating number from the ground truth.
